metodos.codigoOriginal: do SigPrNfs With ThisForm.Podatamgr,"V", ThisForm.pcemps, ThisForm.pcdopes, ThisForm.pcnumes

Lparameters pEmp, pDop, pNum, pSerie

ThisForm.pcEmps      = pEmp
ThisForm.pcDopes     = pDop
ThisForm.pcNumes     = pNum
ThisForm.pcSerie     = pSerie

With ThisForm
	.poDataMgr = CreateObject('fSqlConector', ThisForm.Name)

	If (.poDataMgr.pnIdconn > 0)

		=DoDefault()

		.PodataMgr.Cursorquery('SigCdPam','CrSigCdPam',.f.,.f.,[nnfftlns,nnfftcls])

		If (CrSigCdPam.nnfftlns==999 or CrSigCdPam.Nnfftcls==999)
			.btnReport.Visualiza.Enabled = .t.
		EndIf

		* Duas linhas colocadas para Barăo,pode... [TRUNCADO]

do SigPrNfs With ThisForm.Podatamgr,"I",ThisForm.pcemps, ThisForm.pcdopes, ThisForm.pcnumes 

ThisForm.Release

sqlQueries.queryOriginal: lcSql = [Select c.Nfis,c.EmpdopNums From SigMvNfi c, SigCdOpe a ]+; 		[Where c.emps = ']+ThisForm.pcemps+[' And c.series = ']+Thisform.pcserie+[' ]+; 		[And c.Impress = ?llFalse and c.cancelas = ?llFalse And c.dopes = a.dopes and ]+; 		[a.nfiscals in (1,2) and a.tiponfs <> 4 and a.agrupas = 1 ]+; 		[Union all ]+; 		[Select c.Nfis,c.EmpDopNums From SigMvNfi c, SigCdOpe a, SigCdSer b ]+; 		[Where c.emps = ']+ThisFor... [TRUNCADO]
